serializableData.oldContent: All symbols pay from left to right on adjacent reels starting from the leftmost reel.
GAME RULES
GAME RULES
VOLATILITY
All values are expressed as actual wins in coins.

All symbols pay from left to right on selected paylines.
All wins are multiplied by bet per line.
When winning on multiple paylines, all wins are added to the total win.
Only the highest win is paid per line.
SPACE and ENTER buttons on the keyboard can be used to start and stop the spin.
The theoretical RTP of this game is {0}%
The minimum RTP of this game is {0}%
The maximum RTP of this game is {0}%
MINIMUM BET:
MAXIMUM BET:
Malfunction voids all pays and plays.
RESPIN UNTIL YOU WIN FEATURE

REELS STACKED WITH       TRIGGERS
RESPIN UNTIL YOU WIN FEATURE
IS WILD DURING RESPINS
IS WILD DURING RESPINS
REELS STACKED WITH       TRIGGERS RESPIN UNTIL YOU WIN FEATURE
HOW TO PLAY

Click the          or          buttons to change the bet value and open the bet menu.
Select the bet you want to use in the game.
Press the SPIN button to play.
MAIN GAME INTERFACE
opens the SETTINGS menu that contains settings which affect the way the game is being played.
toggles sound and music on and off
opens the Information page

CREDIT and BET labels show the current balance and current total bet.
Click on the labels to switch between coins view and cash view.
and           change up or down the current bet and open the bet menu, where you can change the bet denominations.
starts the game
AUTOPLAY
opens the automatic play menu
SETTINGS MENU
QUICK SPIN – Selects the Quick Spin setting for game reels to start automatically and stop as soon as released
INTRO SCREEN – toggles the introductory screen on and off
AMBIENT – toggles the ambient sound and music in the game on and off
SOUND FX – toggles the game`s sound effects on and off
GAME HISTORY – opens the game history page
INFORMATION SCREEN
and
scroll between information pages
closes the information screen
BET MENU
The bet menu shows the number of lines available in the game, and the current total bet in both coins and cash.
Use the         and         buttons in the COINS PER LINE and COIN VALUE fields to change the values.
AUTOPLAY
Click on the buttons showing the number of possible auto-spins to start Autoplay
SKIP SCREENS option auto-skips the feature introduction and end screens after a short period of time
STOP AUTOPLAY
ON ANY WIN – whenever you win something, the Autoplay function stops
IF FEATURE IS WON – whenever a feature like bonus game or free spins is won, Autoplay will stop
IF SINGLE WIN EXCEEDS – whenever a single win is above the sum written in this field, the Autoplay function stops
IF CASH INCREASES BY – whenever your current balance is above the sum written in this field, the Autoplay function stops
IF CASH DECREASES BY – whenever your current balance is below the sum written in this field, the Autoplay function stops
START AUTOPLAY – starts the Autoplay function
fffffffd
PAYS
PAYS
fffffG
If the full screen is stacked with the same symbol, including WILD, the DOUBLE MULTIPLIER WHEEL feature is triggered.
DOUBLE MULTIPLIER WHEEL

When two full vertical stacks off the same symbol hit, the reel that doesn't contain a symbol of the same type re-spins until you win. The stacks that initiated the feature remain in place until any winning combination hits.
This symbol is WILD and substitutes for all symbols.
Medium volatility games pay out steadily and the range of pays varies from low to very high

Two wheel of fortune are shown on the screen. The lower wheel spins, and can award a multiplier for the total win of the spin of 2x, 3x, 4x, 5x or an UP item that moves to the upper wheel. If it moves to the upper wheel, the wheel spins and awards a multiplier for the total win of the spin of 7x, 8x, 10x, 12x or 20x.
Special reels are in play during the feature.

serializableData._text: 从最左侧的卷轴起临近卷轴上所有符号从左向右支付。
游戏规则
游戏规则
波动
所有数值表示为钱币的实际赢金

所有奖励将从左至右顺序支付。
所赢奖励将会与每条线的投注相乘。
如果多条支付线上有赢奖，则所有赢奖都将加入到总赢奖中。
每条派彩线上仅仅支付最高奖金。
键盘上的空格和回车按钮可用于开始和停止旋转。
本游戏的理论RTP为 {0}%
本游戏的最低回报率为 {0}%
本游戏的最高回报率为 {0}%
最小赌注：
最大赌注：
系统故障期间所有游戏及赔付无效。
一转到底功能

转轴上堆叠出现       会触发
一转到底功能
是重新旋转期间的WILD
是重新旋转期间的WILD
转轴上堆叠出现       会触发一转到底功能
游戏玩法
点击          或          按钮更改赌注金额或打开赌注菜单。选择您要在游戏中使用的赌注。
按“旋转”按钮开始游戏。
主游戏界面
可打开包含设置的菜单，而这些设置会影响游戏的玩法。
可开启或关闭声音及音乐
可打开“信息”页面
“铜币余额”和“赌注”标签分别显示了当前的余额和总赌注。点击标签可以在金币视图和现金视图之间切换。
和           可增加或减少当前赌注，还能打开赌注菜单，您可以在该菜单中更改赌注面额。
可开始游戏
自动旋转
可打开自动下注游戏菜单
设置菜单
快速旋转 – 为游戏转轴选择“快速选择”设置就能在松开按钮时马上自动开始和停止
介绍屏幕 – 打开或关闭介绍屏幕
渲染 – 打开或关闭游戏中的背景声音和音乐
音量 – 打开或关闭游戏的音量
游戏历史记录 – 打开游戏历史记录页面
“信息”屏幕
和
可在信息页面间滚动
可关闭信息屏幕
赌注菜单
赌注菜单会显示游戏中的可选线数，以及当前的金币和现金总赌注。
使用“每条线的金币”和“金币总值”字段中的          和          按钮可更改数值。
自动旋转
点击带有自动旋转次数的按钮开始自动下注
“跳过屏幕”选项可在短时间内自动跳过功能介绍和结束屏幕
停止自动下注
任何获胜 - 只要赢得胜利，就停止自动下注功能
若功能获胜 - 只要赢得诸如奖励游戏或免费旋转之类的功能，就停止自动下注
若单次奖金超过 - 只要单次奖金金额超过此字段中规定的总额，就停止自动下注功能
若现金增加 - 只要当前余额高于此字段中规定的总额，就停止自动下注功能
若现金减少 - 只要当前余额低于此字段中规定的总额，就停止自动下注功能
开始自动旋转 - 开始“自动下注”功能
fffffffd
赔付
赔付
fffffG
如果整个屏幕都堆叠了相同的符号（包括WILD），则会触发双倍乘数转盘功能。
双倍乘数转盘
如果出现两个完全垂直堆叠的相同符号， 未包含相同类型符号的转轴会重新旋转，直到您获胜。 启动功能的堆叠符号将保留在原位，直到出现赢奖组合。

该符号是WILD
并可替代所有符号。
波动性适中的游戏赔付的金额较为稳定，赔付的范围从低到极高不等
屏幕将出现两个幸运转盘。 下方转盘旋转，然后会奖励一个适用于旋转总奖金的 2x、3x、4x、5x乘数，或一个可移至上方转盘的“向上”物品。 如果它移至上方转盘，则转盘会旋转并 奖励一个适用于总旋转奖金的 7x、8x、10x、12x或20x乘数。
在功能期间以特殊转轴进行游戏。
